compositional_truth_check.details: The biome has undergone a catastrophic collapse. The P3 Pothos and P4 Silver Guest are no longer visible as viable specimens. The white rabbit anchor remains, but the surrounding vegetation has been lost.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Black Pot, rabbit anchor present, plant absent)

plant_audit.P1: No visible plant matter. Soil appears dry and undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: No visible plant matter. Pot appears empty.
plant_audit.P3: Rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos specimen has completely vanished or withered beyond recognition.
plant_audit.P4: No visible plant matter. Only debris remains.

biome_observations.debris: Fragmented eggshell remains in the lower black pot; no signs of fungal growth or new sprouts.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: The desk surface is clear of organic matter, suggesting a total cessation of biological activity.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state showed a single leaf in P3 and a sprout in P4.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Gradual decline in leaf turgor and structural integrity.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Total disappearance of all foliage. The biome has transitioned from a state of decline to a state of total loss.

visual_health_inference.inference: The specimens have suffered total mortality due to likely environmental stress or neglect. No photosynthetic tissue remains to support recovery.

anomalies: Total loss of all registered plant life.
Presence of non-biological debris (eggshells) in the absence of plant life.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. Initially, the biome contained minimal but extant plant life (P3, P4). Over the course of the observation period, there was a progressive decline in the health of these specimens, culminating in their complete disappearance or total necrosis by the current timestamp. The white rabbit anchor remains, but it now sits in a barren, lifeless pot. The biome is effectively dormant/dead.
